title: Kitchenware * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Kitchenware * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household goods (including kitchen items), bedding and linens, and other items. Accepts donations of men's clothing, kitchenware, small appliances, bedding and linens, and bathroom supplies. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER
